parties.name: SCHERZER, TODD 988 FULTON STREET #142 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94117

calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Jul-30-2019 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Todd Scherzer in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that the statute is that there has to be a lawful license to establish fact of marriage and that there needs to be a valid marriage license prior to the ceremony. Mr. Scherzer stated that the real issue is that he filed tax returns for 2018 as married filed jointly, that he then got the license in December, asked if the Court could sign the order and stated that he thinks the law doesn't care if they were married in October or December. Mr. Scherzer also stated that this is his second marriage and he doesn't want to mess anything up, and that he got a confidential license and can not get a full copy of it. The Court noted that it does not see any declaration from an Officiant and that it can not see a December date on the document. The Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage is under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
